en.extract:
The grey-cheeked green pigeon (Treron griseicauda) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae.  It is endemic to Indonesia. Its diet consists of fruit, primarily figs. People in Java, Indonesia commonly hunt it using nylon, in a practice known as racik.

The '''grey-cheeked green pigeon''' ('''''Treron griseicauda''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Columbidae]].  It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]]. Its diet consists of fruit,<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Baptista |first1=Luis F. |last2=Trail |first2=Pepper W. |last3=Horblit |first3=H. M. |last4=Boesman |first4=Peter F. D. |date=2020 |title=Gray-cheeked Green-Pigeon (Treron griseicauda), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/gycpig1/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.gycpig1.01|url-access=subscription }}</ref> primarily [[Ficus|figs]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Kurniawan |first1=Firman Heru |last2=Rahayuningsih |first2=Margareta |last3=Kartijono |first3=Nugroho Edi |last4=Abdullah |first4=Muhammad |date=2022-12-21 |title=EVALUATION ON THE POPULATION OF STRANGLER FIGS (Ficus subgen. Urostigma) IN MOUNT UNGARAN, CENTRAL JAVA |journal=Media Konservasi |volume=27 |issue=3 |pages=83–90 |doi=10.29244/medkon.27.3.83-90 |issn=2502-6313|doi-access=free }}</ref> People in [[Java|Java, Indonesia]] commonly [[Hunting|hunt]] it using nylon, in a practice known as racik.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=ISKANDAR |first1=JOHAN |last2=FATHIN A |first2=SYAHRAS |last3=SILMI R |first3=HASNA |last4=HUSODO |first4=TEGUH |last5=WULANDARI |first5=INDRI |last6=MEGANTARA |first6=ERRI N. |last7=PARTASASMITA |first7=RUHYAT |last8=SYA SHANIDA |first8=SYA |date=2021-07-29 |title=Bird diversity and ethno-ornithological knowledge of local people in Ciletuh-Palabuhanratu Geopark, Sukabumi, West Java, Indonesia |journal=Biodiversitas Journal of Biological Diversity |volume=22 |issue=8 |doi=10.13057/biodiv/d220838 |issn=2085-4722|doi-access=free }}</ref>
